title: IMMZD2DTRabies ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZD2DTRabies ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

No rabies primary series doses were admi.en: No rabies primary series doses were administered

Client is due for rabies vaccination-44.en: Client is due for rabies vaccination

One rabies primary series doses were adm.en: One rabies primary series doses were administered

The latest rabies dose was administered.en: The latest rabies dose was administered less than 7 days ago

Client is not due for rabies vaccination.en: Client is not due for rabies vaccination

The latest rabies dose was administered.en: The latest rabies dose was administered more than 7 days ago

Two rabies primary series doses were adm.en: Two rabies primary series doses were administered
